name: DNSSEC containerlab
postCreateCommand: docker pull internetsystemsconsortium/bind9:9.18 && docker pull alpine:latest && pip install pyshark lxml nest_asyncio
postStartCommand: sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get update && sudo DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y tshark && cd dnssec-lab && sudo containerlab deploy -t dnssec-lab.clab.yml || true
